personalInfo.name: Florent Martinier

experiences.title: Java Back-end Developer
description: Back-end Consultant on assignment at CA-TS.

experiences.title: Kotlin / Angular Full Stack Developer
description: Software development in the Green Tech sector, focusing on environmental measurement and IT decarbonization.
Design of connectors for automated data collection via third-party APIs (AWS, ServiceNow, VMWare, etc.).
Transformation of collected data into environmental footprint metrics.
Development of a frontend dashboard to visualize and manage CO2eq consumption.
Deployment of a Kubernetes / Docker infrastructure to automate execution tasks.

experiences.title: Java / Angular Software Engineer
description: Software development for land surveyors within an R&D department (Geosnap application).
Contribution to technical specification definitions.
Development, maintenance, and code reviews.
Worked within the SAFe (Scaled Agile Framework) methodology.

experiences.title: Java / Angular Software Engineer
description: Development of an internal ERP tool for resource management (tracking availability, skills, and certifications).
Creation of functional and technical specifications from scratch.
Database schema design.
Feature development and implementation.
Technical leadership and mentoring of two apprentices.

experiences.title: GraphTalk Software Engineer
description: Application Maintenance (TMA) for DXC on the GraphTalk A.I.A business solution (Life and Non-Life Insurance sectors).
Requirement gathering and solution design.
Corrective and evolutive maintenance.
Client training on GraphTalk A.I.A technology.

experiences.title: Java Developer Intern
description: Software development in the healthcare sector (wound treatment monitoring).
Software maintenance and feature updates.
Test automation.
